 {"id":"bd-3roc","title":"Task: Create built-in template library","description":"## Purpose
Provide starter templates for common development workflows out of the box.

## Scope
- Create templates: refactor, feature, bugfix, review, migration
- Each template optimized for its workflow type
- Include agent specialization hints

## Acceptance Criteria
- At least 5 built-in templates available
- Templates documented with use cases
- ntm templates list shows available templates
- Templates work without additional configuration

## Technical Notes
- Embed templates in binary using go:embed
- Allow user override of built-in templates
- Include template for multi-repo workflows","notes":"Implemented session templates system: 11 builtin templates including refactor, feature, bugfix (bug-hunt), review (code-review), migration. Added ntm session-templates/templates list and show commands. All template tests pass.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T06:00:02.413073451Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-20T18:23:24.623583221Z","closed_at":"2026-01-20T18:23:24.623497720Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3roc","depends_on_id":"bd-2b35","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3rs5z","title":"Task: E2E tests for handoff CLI","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-28T19:05:24.887525604Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T19:10:43.229570169Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T19:08:53.058351740Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3rs5z","depends_on_id":"bd-khux0","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":32,"issue_id":"bd-3rs5z","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Added E2E test for handoff CLI create/list/show in tests/e2e/handoff_cli_test.go. ok  	github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/tests/e2e	0.008s passes (skipped unless NTM_E2E_TESTS=1).","created_at":"2026-01-28T19:08:41Z"},{"id":33,"issue_id":"bd-3rs5z","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Extended handoff E2E to cover  (display path) in tests/e2e/handoff_cli_test.go. ok  	github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/tests/e2e	0.007s still passes.","created_at":"2026-01-28T19:10:25Z"},{"id":34,"issue_id":"bd-3rs5z","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Added resume coverage for ntm resume --json in tests/e2e/handoff_cli_test.go; go test ./tests/e2e -run TestHandoffCLI_CreateListShow passes.","created_at":"2026-01-28T19:10:43Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3rxri","title":"Task: Route UBS findings to assigned agents (optional)","description":"## Overview
When assignment tracking is enabled, route UBS findings to the agent pane assigned to the file.

## Behavior
- Map file paths to current assignments
- Send a concise summary to the relevant agent pane
- No routing if assignments missing

## Acceptance Criteria
- Findings routed deterministically
- Disabled by default or behind config","notes":"## Testing Requirements
- Unit tests: core logic, error paths, edge cases.
- E2E scripts: full CLI/robot flow with detailed log/slog prefixes (e.g., [E2E-<AREA>]) and include session/agent/bead IDs.
- If structured outputs are affected, assert schema stability + deterministic ordering.

 {"id":"bd-3s2f","title":"EPIC: Webhook System for External Integrations","description":"## Overview
Implement an event-driven webhook system that triggers HTTP callbacks on NTM events, enabling integration with Slack, Discord, PagerDuty, CI/CD systems, and custom automation.

## Problem Statement
NTM operates as a closed system. Users can't:
- Get notified in Slack when agents complete work
- Trigger CI pipelines when all agents finish
- Alert PagerDuty when errors occur
- Build custom dashboards from live data
- Integrate with existing DevOps tooling

## Key Features
1. Configurable webhook endpoints per event type
2. Built-in formatters for Slack, Discord, Teams
3. Retry logic with exponential backoff
4. Event filtering by session, agent type, severity
5. Payload templates with variable substitution

## Event Types
- agent.started: Agent session created
- agent.completed: Agent finished task
- agent.error: Agent encountered error
- agent.idle: Agent became idle
- session.created: New NTM session
- session.ended: Session terminated
- bead.assigned: Bead assigned to agent
- bead.completed: Bead marked done

## Configuration (ntm.yaml)
webhooks:
  - url: https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx
    events: [agent.completed, agent.error]
    formatter: slack
    filter:
      session: myproject*
      severity: [warning, error, critical]
  - url: https://my-api.com/ntm-events
    events: [*]
    formatter: json

## Success Criteria
- Webhooks fire reliably on configured events
- Built-in formatters produce valid Slack/Discord messages
- Failures don't block NTM operation
- Easy to configure without code changes

## Files Likely Affected
- internal/webhook/manager.go (new - webhook orchestration)
- internal/webhook/formatters/ (new - Slack, Discord, JSON formatters)
- internal/config/webhooks.go (new - webhook config parsing)
- internal/events/emitter.go (event emission points)","notes":"## Testing Requirements
- Unit tests: core logic, error paths, edge cases.
- E2E scripts: full CLI/robot flow with detailed log/slog prefixes (e.g., [E2E-<AREA>]) and include session/agent/bead IDs.
- If structured outputs are affected, assert schema stability + deterministic ordering.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-19T18:31:02.505475988Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-19T19:48:18.806255925Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3s2wn","title":"Task: tmux pipe-pane streaming integration","description":"## Scope\nStream live pane output using tmux pipe-pane with fallback capture-pane polling.\n\n## Implementation\n- On pane spawn: tmux pipe-pane -o to internal streamer.\n- Streamer emits WS events + writes to log for replay.\n- Fallback to capture-pane polling if pipe-pane fails.\n\n## Logging\n- Log pipe-pane attach/detach, fallback activation, pane IDs.\n\n## Tests\n- Unit: streamer handles chunk boundaries and encoding.\n- Integration: spawn session, verify WS output matches pane content.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- Live output latency < 100ms under normal load.\n- Fallback works when pipe-pane unavailable.\n","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"claude-opus-4.5","created_at":"2026-01-23T22:51:44.010812813Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T18:31:28.933982268Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T18:31:28.933849621Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3s2wn","depends_on_id":"bd-204ic","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3s2wn","depends_on_id":"bd-yn7qe","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T23:34:29Z","created_by":"import"}]}
